compassionate.en: The nurse is gentle and compassionate.
compassionate.zh: 這位護士既溫柔又有同情心。

compatible.en: This printer is compatible with my computer.
compatible.zh: 這台印表機和我的電腦相容。

compel.en: Bad weather compelled us to stay home.
compel.zh: 惡劣的天氣迫使我們待在家。

compensate.en: The company will compensate her for the loss.

compensation.en: He received compensation for his injury.

competence.en: She showed great competence at her job.
competence.zh: 她在工作上展現了高度的能力。

competent.en: He is a competent and reliable worker.
competent.zh: 他是個能幹又可靠的員工。

complexity.en: The complexity of the problem surprised us.
complexity.zh: 這個問題的複雜程度讓我們驚訝。

compliance.en: Compliance with the rules is required.

complication.en: A small complication delayed the trip.
complication.zh: 一個小問題延誤了行程。

compliment.en: She paid me a kind compliment.
compliment.zh: 她給了我一句善意的稱讚。

comply.en: All drivers must comply with the law.
comply.zh: 所有駕駛都必須遵守法律。

component.en: Each component of the machine is important.
component.zh: 機器的每個零件都很重要。

compound.en: Water is a compound of hydrogen and oxygen.

comprehend.en: It is hard to comprehend such a huge number.
comprehend.zh: 這麼大的數字很難理解。

comprehension.en: The test checks your reading comprehension.
comprehension.zh: 這個測驗檢測你的閱讀理解。

comprise.zh: 這支隊伍由十名成員組成。

compromise.en: Both sides reached a fair compromise.
compromise.zh: 雙方達成了公平的妥協。

compulsory.en: English is a compulsory subject at school.
compulsory.zh: 英文是學校的必修科目。

conceal.en: He tried to conceal his disappointment.

concede.en: She conceded that she had made an error.

conceive.en: It is hard to conceive of life without phones.
conceive.zh: 很難想像沒有手機的生活。

conception.en: He has a clear conception of his goals.
conception.zh: 他對自己的目標有清楚的概念。

condemn.zh: 人們譴責這個殘忍的行為。

conduct.zh: 科學家進行了一項實驗。

confine.en: The sick boy was confined to his bed.
confine.zh: 生病的男孩被限制臥床休息。

conform.en: Students must conform to the dress code.
conform.zh: 學生必須遵守服裝規定。

confront.en: She had to confront her fear.
confront.zh: 她必須面對自己的恐懼。

confrontation.en: They avoided a confrontation with their boss.
confrontation.zh: 他們避免和老闆起衝突。

consecutive.en: It rained for five consecutive days.

consensus.en: The group reached a consensus quickly.
consensus.zh: 這個團體很快達成了共識。

consent.en: You need your parents' consent to join.
consent.zh: 你需要父母的同意才能參加。

conservation.en: Water conservation is important in summer.

considerate.en: It was considerate of you to help.

constitutional.en: Free speech is a constitutional right.
constitutional.zh: 言論自由是憲法賦予的權利。

constraint.en: Time was the main constraint on the project.
constraint.zh: 時間是這個專案的主要限制。

consultation.en: She booked a consultation with the doctor.
consultation.zh: 她預約了和醫生的諮詢。

consumption.en: We should reduce our energy consumption.
consumption.zh: 我們應該減少能源消耗。

contaminate.en: Dirty water can contaminate the river.

contemplate.en: He contemplated his next move carefully.
contemplate.zh: 他仔細思考下一步該怎麼走。

contempt.en: He looked at the cheater with contempt.
contempt.zh: 他輕蔑地看著作弊的人。

contend.en: Two teams contend for the title.

continental.en: The hotel serves a continental breakfast.
continental.zh: 這家飯店供應歐陸式早餐。

contractor.en: The contractor built the new house.
contractor.zh: 承包商建造了這棟新房子。

contradiction.en: There is a contradiction in his story.

controversy.en: The decision caused a lot of controversy.
controversy.zh: 這個決定引起了很多爭議。

conversion.en: The conversion from miles to kilometers is easy.
conversion.zh: 從英里換算成公里很容易。

convert.en: They converted the garage into a room.
convert.zh: 他們把車庫改成了一個房間。

convict.en: The court convicted him of theft.

conviction.zh: 她說話帶著堅定的信念。

copyright.en: The song is protected by copyright.

core.en: Honesty is at the core of his character.

corporate.en: She works in a large corporate office.
corporate.zh: 她在一間大型企業辦公室工作。

corporation.zh: 這家企業在世界各地都有辦公室。

correlation.en: There is a correlation between sleep and health.
correlation.zh: 睡眠與健康之間有關聯。

correspondent.en: The correspondent reported from the city.
correspondent.zh: 這位特派記者從該城市發出報導。

corridor.en: Her office is at the end of the corridor.
corridor.zh: 她的辦公室在走廊的盡頭。

corrupt.zh: 那名貪污的官員收受賄賂。

corruption.en: They fought against corruption in government.
corruption.zh: 他們對抗政府裡的貪腐。

counsel.en: The teacher gave us wise counsel.
counsel.zh: 老師給了我們明智的忠告。

courteous.en: The staff were friendly and courteous.
courteous.zh: 工作人員既友善又有禮貌。

coverage.en: The news coverage of the event was wide.
coverage.zh: 這個事件的新聞報導很廣泛。

creek.en: We caught small fish in the creek.
creek.zh: 我們在小溪裡抓到小魚。

cripple.en: The strike crippled the train service.
cripple.zh: 罷工癱瘓了火車的營運。

criterion-criteria.en: Price is one criterion when we buy a car.
criterion-criteria.zh: 價格是我們買車時的一個標準。

crude.en: They make fuel from crude oil.

cruise.en: They took a cruise around the islands.
cruise.zh: 他們搭郵輪環遊這些島嶼。

crystal.en: The lake water was as clear as crystal.

cuisine.en: I love the spicy cuisine of Thailand.

currency.en: The dollar is a common currency.
currency.zh: 美元是一種通用的貨幣。

curriculum.en: Art is part of the school curriculum.
curriculum.zh: 美術是學校課程的一部分。

custody.en: The mother got custody of the children.
custody.zh: 母親獲得了孩子的監護權。

customs.en: We passed through customs at the airport.

deadly.zh: 這種蛇的咬傷是致命的。

debris.en: Debris covered the road after the storm.
debris.zh: 暴風雨後碎片散落在路上。

debut.en: The singer made her debut on TV.
debut.zh: 這位歌手在電視上首次亮相。

deceive.en: Don't let his smile deceive you.

declaration.en: They signed a declaration of friendship.
declaration.zh: 他們簽署了一份友好宣言。

decline.zh: 上個月銷售量大幅下降。

dedicate.en: She dedicated her life to teaching.

defendant.en: The defendant stood before the judge.

deficit.en: The country has a large budget deficit.
deficit.zh: 這個國家有龐大的預算赤字。

delegate.en: Each country sent a delegate to the meeting.
delegate.zh: 每個國家都派了一名代表參加會議。

delegation.en: A delegation visited the new factory.
delegation.zh: 一個代表團參觀了新工廠。

deliberate.en: It was a deliberate choice, not an accident.
deliberate.zh: 那是個故意的選擇，不是意外。

democrat.en: He is a strong democrat who values freedom.
democrat.zh: 他是個堅定的民主人士，重視自由。

denial.en: His denial did not convince the police.
denial.zh: 他的否認沒能說服警方。

density.en: The forest has a high density of trees.
density.zh: 這座森林的樹木密度很高。

depict.en: The painting depicts a quiet village.
depict.zh: 這幅畫描繪了一個寧靜的村莊。

deploy.en: They deployed workers to fix the road.

depress.zh: 連日的雨讓她心情低落。

deputy.en: The deputy ran the office while the boss was away.
deputy.zh: 老闆不在時由副手管理辦公室。

derive.en: Many English words derive from Latin.
derive.zh: 許多英文字源自拉丁文。

descriptive.en: She wrote a descriptive paragraph about the sea.
descriptive.zh: 她寫了一段描寫大海的文字。

despair.en: She felt despair after losing her job.
despair.zh: 失去工作後她感到絕望。

destination.zh: 我們最終的目的地是東京。

destiny.en: She believed it was her destiny to teach.
destiny.zh: 她相信教書是她的命運。

destructive.en: The fire was sudden and destructive.
destructive.zh: 這場火既突然又具破壞性。

devotion.en: Her devotion to her family is clear.
devotion.zh: 她對家庭的奉獻顯而易見。

diagnose.en: The doctor diagnosed the illness quickly.
diagnose.zh: 醫生很快診斷出了病情。

diagnosis.en: The diagnosis showed a minor problem.
diagnosis.zh: 診斷結果顯示是個小問題。

dialect.en: People in the south speak a different dialect.
dialect.zh: 南部的人說不同的方言。

diameter.en: The circle has a diameter of ten centimeters.
diameter.zh: 這個圓的直徑是十公分。

digestion.en: A walk after meals helps digestion.

dilemma.zh: 她面臨一個艱難的兩難。

dimension.en: We measured every dimension of the box.
dimension.zh: 我們測量了箱子的每個尺寸。

diminish.en: The noise diminished as the train left.
diminish.zh: 火車離開後噪音漸漸減弱。

diplomatic.en: She handled the issue in a diplomatic way.
diplomatic.zh: 她以圓融的方式處理這個問題。

directory.en: I found his number in the directory.
directory.zh: 我在通訊錄裡找到他的號碼。

disapprove.en: My parents disapprove of staying up late.

disclose.en: He refused to disclose the secret.

discourse.en: The book is a discourse on freedom.
discourse.zh: 這本書是對自由的論述。

discriminate.en: We should not discriminate against anyone.

discrimination.en: The law bans discrimination at work.
discrimination.zh: 法律禁止在職場上歧視。

disrupt.en: The storm disrupted the bus service.
disrupt.zh: 暴風雨打亂了公車的營運。

dissolve.en: Sugar dissolves quickly in hot water.

distinction.en: There is a clear distinction between the two.
distinction.zh: 這兩者之間有明顯的區別。

distinctive.en: The bird has a distinctive song.

distract.en: Loud music can distract you from studying.
distract.zh: 大聲的音樂會讓你讀書分心。

doctrine.en: The students learned about the doctrine.
doctrine.zh: 學生們學習了這個教義。

document.zh: 請在這裡的文件上簽名。

documentary.en: We watched a documentary about wild animals.
documentary.zh: 我們看了一部關於野生動物的紀錄片。

domain.en: Science is her area of domain.

dome.en: The building has a golden dome.
dome.zh: 這棟建築有一個金色的圓頂。

donate.en: They donated old clothes to charity.
donate.zh: 他們把舊衣服捐給慈善機構。

donation.en: Her donation helped build the library.
donation.zh: 她的捐款幫助建了這座圖書館。

donor.en: A generous donor paid for the new park.
donor.zh: 一位慷慨的捐贈者出資建了新公園。

doorway.en: She stood in the doorway and waved.

dough.en: She kneaded the dough to make bread.

dreadful.en: The weather was dreadful all weekend.
dreadful.zh: 整個週末天氣都很糟糕。

driveway.en: He parked the car in the driveway.
driveway.zh: 他把車停在自家車道上。

drought.en: The long drought killed many crops.
drought.zh: 長期的乾旱使許多作物枯死。

ecology.en: She studies the ecology of the rainforest.

ecosystem.en: A pond is a small ecosystem.
ecosystem.zh: 池塘是一個小型生態系。

ego.zh: 獲勝助長了他的自尊心。

elaborate.en: She made an elaborate plan for the party.
elaborate.zh: 她為派對做了精心的規劃。

eligible.en: You are eligible to apply for the prize.
eligible.zh: 你有資格申請這個獎項。

eloquent.zh: 她做了一場雄辯有力的演講。

embrace.en: They embraced after the long trip.

emission.en: The factory must reduce its emissions.
emission.zh: 這家工廠必須減少排放。

endorse.en: A famous star endorsed the product.
endorse.zh: 一位有名的明星為這個產品代言。

enthusiastic.en: The fans were loud and enthusiastic.

entitle.en: This ticket entitles you to a free drink.
entitle.zh: 這張票讓你享有一杯免費飲料。

entity.en: The club is a separate entity from the school.
entity.zh: 這個社團是獨立於學校的個體。

entrepreneur.en: The young entrepreneur started a tech company.
entrepreneur.zh: 這位年輕的創業家成立了一家科技公司。

envious.en: She was envious of her sister's prize.

envision.zh: 他設想一個更乾淨的未來。

epidemic.en: The town fought to stop the epidemic.
epidemic.zh: 這個城鎮努力阻止流行病蔓延。

episode.en: I watched the first episode of the show.
episode.zh: 我看了這部劇的第一集。

equation.en: She solved the math equation quickly.
equation.zh: 她很快解出了那個數學方程式。

equity.en: The school treats all students with equity.
equity.zh: 這所學校公平地對待所有學生。

equivalent.en: One dollar is equivalent to 30 dollars here.
equivalent.zh: 一美元相當於這裡的三十元。

erect.en: They erected a tent in the field.
erect.zh: 他們在田野裡搭起一頂帳篷。
